rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERTA PERSON FAMILY TRUST DATED DECEMBER 23, 1999
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1)The accounting is out of balance by $806 (more charges than credits). 2)Accounting is not complete: a.Fair market value of real property at the end of the accounting period was not provided. b.Schedule of liabilities were not provided. c.Cash at hand at end of account has not been verified. d.Many descriptions are missing in the receipts and disbursements schedules or are inadequate. 3)Attorney requests payment of fees made in 2013 totaling $1,510 be allowed; however, it appears that a total of $1,934 was paid, which may be a result of an erroneous double payment of $434.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANIE YEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/16/19 1. The 13100 Declaration for David Yee's share does not have a copy of his death certificate attached, as required by Prob. C. Sec. 13101(d). 2. The 13100 Declaration for Wing Wong's share has a copy of his death certificate, not an original certified copy. Please file the original certified copy of each death certificate, with a declaration stating that it is an attachment to the corresponding 13100 Declaration already filed. Endorsed-filed copies of all documents must be received in Room 202 by 7/10/19.
